name: 20ct Christmas Tinsel Lights Gold with Warm White Lights with Green Wire - Wondershop™
description:
Wrap your space in radiant holiday sparkle with these 20-Count Christmas Tinsel Lights Gold with Warm White Lights from Wondershop™. These decorative string lights showcase a dark green wire strung with gold tinsel rounds and fitted with 20 warm white LED bulbs to dazzle your decor with shimmer and shine. Suitable for indoor use, these electric-powered string lights with a constant light effect can be connected up to 90 sets for a stunning presentation and are also cool to the touch when lit.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
